title: Fnnbu

{{Quote|You're only pirate ''scum!''|One of Bogga's enforcers, to Fnnbu|<ref name="nomi3" />}}
'''Fnnbu''' was a [[Zexx]] confederate of the notorious [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Finhead Stonebone]], active in the [[Time/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. In [[3999 BBY]], Fnnbu accompanied a group of Stonebone-affiliated [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|pirates]] and [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcers]] in the employ of local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to the desolate [[Stenness Node]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]], on a mission to retrieve a lost shipment of valuable [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] held by Bogga's sworn enemy, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]]. To their surprise, Thon refused to fight back once the menagerie landed on Ambria's surface, and the Adegan [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were soon found. However, Thon's [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentice]], [[Nomi Sunrider]], used a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] known as [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], hoping to turn the pirates and enforcers against each other. Her attempt was successful, and Fnnbu was the first to fall under the influence of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] power. Fnnbu flew into a violent rage, [[Unarmed combat/Legends|attacking]] friend and foe alike, and within moments all of the pirates and enforcers were brawling with each other. Sunrider then [[Skirmish on Ambria|attacked]] the group with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], [[Death/Legends|killing]], among others, Fnnbu.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Sorry, cap'n–the crystals belong to the Zexx!|Fnnbu, to Finhead Stonebone|<ref name="nomi3" />}}
Fnnbu was a [[Zexx]] associate of [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Finhead Stonebone]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. In [[3999 BBY]], Fnnbu accompanied a group consisting of both [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|Stonebone's pirate gang]] and [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcers]] in the employ of the [[Stenness Node]]–based [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], on a mission to the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]. The ensemble was sent by Bogga to retrieve a lost shipment of [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] from Bogga's sworn enemy, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]], in exchange for Bogga's granting of freedom to Stonebone's crew, who had been captured after a failed [[Attack on the Ithullan ore hauler|raid]] on an [[Ithullan ore hauler]]. The group descended onto Ambria's surface adjacent to [[Ambria Jedi Enclave|Master Thon's compound]], and soon encountered Master Thon, who to their surprise refused to fight back. [[Unidentified enforcer|One of Bogga's men]] soon found the Adegan [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]], although the enforcer refused to share them with the pirates. While Fnnbu and Stonebone argued with the enforcers over who would claim credit for the discovery of the crystals, Thon's [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentice]], [[Nomi Sunrider]], used a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] called [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], hoping to influence the minds of the invading crew to turn them against each other.<ref name="nomi3" />

Fnnbu was the first to fall under the will of Nomi Sunrider's battle meditation. Stepping to the forefront, Fnnbu demanded that he handle the crystals, promising to guard them for Bogga the Hutt. However, when the enforcers refused, Fnnbu flew into a violent rage, claiming the crystals belonged to him and attacking both friend and foe alike. A large [[Unarmed combat/Legends|brawl]] broke out between the enforcers and the pirates, and eventually pirates and enforcers were fighting beings on their own respective sides. Fnnbu personally squared off with [[C'borp]], a fellow pirate and chief [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] on the pirate [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]''. While the pirates and enforcers were fighting each other, Nomi Sunrider ignited her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and [[Skirmish on Ambria|attacked]] the group. Fnnbu and the rest were caught unawares, and Fnnbu was quickly [[Death/Legends|slain]] by the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainee]].<ref name="nomi3" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I'm the ''strongest!''|Fnnbu|<ref name="nomi3" />}}
Fnnbu was a gruff, imposing pirate in Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang. He was easily influenced by mind-based [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers, being the first to fall under the spell of Nomi Sunrider's battle meditation. He had a tendency to refer to himself in the third person, and also referred to Finhead Stonebone respectfully as "cap'n." He was immensely physically strong, easily tossing around several beings who tried to restrain him as he became violent during the brawl on Ambria.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fnnbu first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider|Tales of the Jedi: The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'', the second story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]] and released over early [[1993]] to late [[1994]]. Fnnbu made his sole appearance in the [[Tales of the Jedi 5|third and final issue]] of the arc, playing a minor role, and was killed at the climax of the issue. In this appearance, Fnnbu was illustrated by [[David Roach]].<ref name="nomi3" /> Although Fnnbu was absent from the ''Tales of the Jedi'' [[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|audio adaptation]], his lines were attributed to several nameless characters.<ref name="audio">[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]</ref> In [[2008]], Fnnbu was given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
